result.stdout:
Usage: [command] [options...] [-h|--help] [--version]

Analyzes Razor components/pages in the specified project and generates code usable with BlazorPathHelper.

Options:
  -p|--projects <string[]?>          The directory containing the .csproj file or the path to the `.csproj` file. If not specified, a selection form will be displayed. (Default: null)
  -c|--output-class-name <string>    The name of the generated class. (Default: @"WebPaths")
  -o|--output-path <string>          Specifies the output destination for the generated code. (Default: @"./")
  --force|--force-export             Whether to overwrite the file if it already exists in the output destination. If not specified, confirmation will be prompted. (Optional)
  --dry-run                          Whether to perform a dry run. If true, the code will not be generated. (Optional)

Commands:
  version    print version information.
